mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT STOCK_CODE, STOCK_NAME, MARKET_TYPE FROM STOCKS WHERE STOCK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STOCK_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY STOCK_NAME) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
SELECT STOCK_CODE, STOCK_NAME, MARKET_TYPE FROM STOCKS WHERE STOCK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STOCK_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY STOCK_NAME

SELECT NEWS_INFO_ID, NEWS_TITLE, NEWS_DESCRIPTION, PUBLISHED_AT, ARTICLE_LINK, PUBLISHER FROM NEWS_INFO WHERE NEWS_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR NEWS_DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY PUBLISHED_AT DESC
